title: Payment for Renewal of License Fee. After compliance with all the
content: 59 requirements and the application for renewal of license has been approved by the 60 15 Department, a license fee in the amount of Two Hundred Thousand Pesos 1 (Php200,000.00) shall be paid before the license is released. 2 3 E. ESCROW DEPOSIT 4 5
